mapper.select: SELECT T2.ID "id", T2.CLASS_CODE "classCode", T2.CLASS_NAME "className", T2.WORK_DATE "workDate", T3.PROCESS_DETAIL_CODE "processCode", T3.PROCESS_DETAIL_NAME "processName", T3.QUANTITY "quantity", T3.WORK_HOUR "ton", T4.IS_SETTLE "isSettle" FROM T_BUS_TRUST T JOIN T_PRD_WORK_PLAN t1 ON T.ID = t1.TRUST_ID JOIN T_PRD_WORK_TICKET t2 ON t1.ID = t2.WORK_PLAN_ID JOIN T_PRD_WORK_TICKET_DETAIL t3 ON t2.ID = t3.WORK_TICKET_ID LEFT JOIN M_WORK_PROCESS t4 ON t3.PROCESS_DETAIL_CODE = t4.PROCESS_CD WHERE T.ID = #{trustId,jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY t3.WORK_DATE, t3.CLASS_CODE, t3.CLASS_NAME

SELECT TPWE.ID, TPWE.PROCESS_CODE, TPWE.PROCESS_NAME, TPWE.QUANTITY, TO_CHAR(TPWE.START_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') START_TIME, TPWE.SHIPVOYAGE_ID, TPWE.CREATE_BY_NAME, TO_CHAR(TPWE.CREATE_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') CREATE_TIME, LISTAGG(SFB.FILE_ID, ',') WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY SFB.FILE_ID ) FILE_IDS FROM T_PRD_WATER_ELECTRICITY TPWE LEFT JOIN SYS_FILE_BUSINESS SFB ON TPWE.ID = SFB.BUSINESS_ID WHERE TPWE.TRUST_ID = #{trustId,jdbcType=BIGINT} GROUP BY TPWE.ID, TPWE.PROCESS_CODE, TPWE.PROCESS_NAME, TPWE.QUANTITY, TPWE.START_TIME, TPWE.SHIPVOYAGE_ID, CREATE_BY_NAME, TPWE.CREATE_TIME ORDER BY TPWE.START_TIME

SELECT TBT.ID, TBT.TRUST_TYPE, TBT.IS_BILL, TBT.PROCESS_CODE, TBT.PROCESS_NAME, TBT.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, TBT.SHIP_NAME, TBT.CUSTOMER_ID, TBC.CUSTOMER_NAME, TBT.COMPANY_ID, TBT.COMPANY_NAME, TBT.STATUS, TYPE FROM T_BUS_TRUST TBT left join T_BUS_CUSTOMER TBC ON TBC.ID = TBT.CUSTOMER_ID WHERE TBT.ID = #{trustId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.update: UPDATE T_BUS_TRUST SET CHECK_BY = #{loginUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, CHECK_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CHECK_TIME = #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, CHECK_NUMBER = #{checkNumber,jdbcType=INTEGER}, CHECK_TON = #{checkTon,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, STATUS = '50' where ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
UPDATE T_BUS_TRUST SET CHECK_BY = null, CHECK_BY_NAME = null, CHECK_TIME = null, CHECK_NUMBER = null, CHECK_TON = null, STATUS = '40' where ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: SELECT TBR.ID, TBR.RATE_ITEM_CODE, TBR.RATE_ITEM_NAME, TBR.RATE, TBR.TAX_RATE, MFI.IS_MAIN_INCOME FROM T_BUS_RATE TBR left join M_FEE_ITEM MFI on TBR.RATE_ITEM_CODE = MFI.ITEM_CD WHERE TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') >= TBR.START_DATE AND TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') <= TBR.END_DATE AND TBR.PROCESS_CODE = #{processCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_MISC_BILLING(ID, RATE_ITEM_CODE, RATE_NAME, RATE, TAX_RATE, BILL_DATE, VOYAGE_ID, SHIP_VOYAGE, BILL_QUANTITY, UNIT_CODE,UNIT_NAME,AMOUNT_MONEY, TAX_AMOUNT, TRUST_ORDER_ID, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY_NAME, CUSTOMER_ID, STATUS, PUBLISH_BY, PUBLISH_BY_NAME, PUBLISH_TIME, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME,RATE_ID,PROCESS_CODE,PROCESS_NAME, CARGO_INFO_ID,CARGO_INFO_NAME) VALUES (#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{rateItemCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rateName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rate, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{taxRate, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{billDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{voyageId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{shipVoyage, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{billQuantity, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{unitCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{unitName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{amountMoney, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{taxAmount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{trustOrderId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateByName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{status, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{publishBy, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{publishByName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{publishTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{companyId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{companyName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{rateId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{processCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{processName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT},#{cargoInfoName,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select:
SELECT A.ID, A.RATE_ITEM_CODE, A.RATE_NAME, A.RATE, A.TAX_RATE, A.BILL_DATE, A.RATE_ID, A.VOYAGE_ID, A.SHIP_VOYAGE, A.BILL_QUANTITY, A.BILL_QUANTITY2, A.AMOUNT_MONEY, A.TAX_AMOUNT, A.TRUST_ORDER_ID, A.CREATE_BY, A.CREATE_BY_NAME, A.CREATE_TIME, A.UPDATE_BY, A.UPDATE_TIME, A.UPDATE_BY_NAME, A.CUSTOMER_ID, A.STATUS, A.company_id, A.company_name FROM T_MISC_BILLING A
AND A.TRUST_ORDER_ID = #{trustId}

SELECT TBCI.ID,TBCI.CARGO_NAME,TBCI.IS_CLEAR,CARGO_INFO_NO||'-'||TBCI.CARGO_NAME||'-' ||DECODE(TBCI.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID,NULL,'',TBCI.SHIP_NAME||'_'||TDSI.VOYAGE||'-') ||TBCI.TRADE_TYPE AS CARGO_INFO_NAME FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI INNER JOIN T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO TBTC ON TBCI.ID = TBTC.CARGO_INFO_ID LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM TDSI ON TBCI.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = TDSI.ID WHERE TBTC.TRUST_ID = #{trustId}

SELECT TPCW.ID, TPCW.PROCESS_CODE, TPCW.PROCESS_NAME, TPCW.QUANTITY "quantity", TO_CHAR(TPCW.START_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') START_TIME, TPCW.SHIPVOYAGE_ID, TPCW.CREATE_BY_NAME, TO_CHAR(TPCW.CREATE_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') CREATE_TIME, LISTAGG(SFB.FILE_ID, ',') WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY SFB.FILE_ID ) FILE_IDS FROM T_PRD_CARGO_WATER TPCW LEFT JOIN SYS_FILE_BUSINESS SFB ON TPCW.ID = SFB.BUSINESS_ID WHERE TPCW.TRUST_ID = #{trustId,jdbcType=BIGINT} GROUP BY TPCW.ID, TPCW.PROCESS_CODE, TPCW.PROCESS_NAME, TPCW.QUANTITY, TPCW.START_TIME, TPCW.SHIPVOYAGE_ID, CREATE_BY_NAME, TPCW.CREATE_TIME ORDER BY TPCW.START_TIME
